notes: Game runs perfectly. It comes with 2 different versions, the "Classic" and the "collector's CD", the second one lags badly, but the Classic one runs perfect. Great game, would love to see a more "native" version since it runs via DOSBox.
title: STAR WARS™ - X-Wing Special Edition

notes: Worked fine out of the box.
